title: Cracks in the Night
description: As you rest beside your campfire, faint cracking echoes through the darkness. The egg begins to split open. A tiny dragon struggles to free itself, looking to you as the first creature it sees.

options.title: Protect the Hatchling
options.description: You shelter the frightened dragon and earn its trust.

options.title: Train the Dragon
options.description: You begin raising the dragon to become a powerful companion.

options.title: Leave It Behind
options.description: The dragon watches as you walk away into the night.
